user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view all job vacancies with vacancy code, RRF id, work location, employee class, number of vacancies and dates, so that I can track open positions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Job Vacancy screen; When the list loads; Then each vacancy shows vacancy code, RRF id, work location, employee class, number of vacancies, requisition created date, position closing date, assigned recruiters and status

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to filter vacancies by status using the New, Assigned, In Process, Closed, Withdrawn and All tabs, so that I can focus on vacancies at a specific stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Job Vacancy screen; When I click a status tab such as In Process (26); Then only vacancies in that status are listed with a matching count

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to see which recruiters are assigned to each vacancy, so that I know who is responsible for filling it
acceptance_criteria: Given a vacancy is listed; When I view its row; Then the assigned recruiters are displayed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to review requisition created and position closing dates, so that I can prioritise vacancies nearing their closing date
acceptance_criteria: Given vacancies with created and closing dates; When I view the list; Then the requisition created date and position closing date are shown for each vacancy

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the vacancy list, so that I always see the current set of open positions
acceptance_criteria: Given the Job Vacancy screen is open; When I click Refresh; Then the vacancy list reloads with the latest data
